## Story Coverage Summary

| Story | Type | Automated Test Required | Manual Verification Required |
|-------|------|------------------------|------------------------------|
| [story title] | Unit | Unit test — `tests/unit/[module]/` | None |
| [story title] | Integration | Integration test — `tests/integration/[system]/` | Smoke check |
| [story title] | E2E | E2E test (Playwright/Cypress) — `tests/e2e/` | Golden path walkthrough |
| [story title] | UI / UX | Component tests + visual regression (optional) | Manual step-through |
| [story title] | Security | SAST / DAST / deps audit | Threat review sign-off |
| [story title] | Performance | Load test (k6/Artillery/JMeter) | Observe dashboards |

**Totals**: [N] Unit, [N] Integration, [N] E2E, [N] UI, [N] Security, [N] Performance

---

## Automated Tests Required

### [Story Title] — Unit

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/[module]/[story-slug].test.[ext]`

**What to test**:
- [Pure function / business rule — e.g., "computePrice(qty, discount) clamps discount ∈ [0, 1]"]
- [Each branch and state transition]
- [Error paths — invalid input → typed error]

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Zero / minimum input values
- Maximum / boundary input values
- Invalid or null input
- [Domain-specific edge cases]

**Estimated test count**: ~[N] unit tests

---

### [Story Title] — Integration

**Test file path**: `tests/integration/[system]/[story-slug].test.[ext]`

**What to test**:
- [Cross-module interaction — e.g., "login endpoint → JWT issuance → session stored in Redis"]
- [Round-trip — e.g., "POST /users creates row; GET /users/:id returns it"]
- [Transactional rollback on failure]

---

### [Story Title] — E2E

**Test file path**: `tests/e2e/[flow-slug].spec.[ext]`

**What to test**:
- [User flow from entry point to completion]
- [Happy path + 1-2 critical error paths]

**Tooling**: Playwright / Cypress / WebDriver

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### [Story Title] — UI / UX

**Verification method**: Manual step-through + screenshot evidence
**Evidence file**: `production/qa/evidence/[story-slug]-evidence.md`
**Who must sign off**: [ux-lead / designer / frontend-architect]

- [ ] [Specific observable condition — e.g., "form error message appears within 300ms of invalid submit"]
- [ ] [A11y check — keyboard nav, screen reader label, color contrast]
- [ ] [Responsive check — mobile/tablet/desktop breakpoints]

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before QA hand-off (run via `/smoke-check`):

1. App / service starts without error (healthcheck 200)
2. Authentication flow works (login → authenticated request → logout)
3. [Primary feature introduced or changed this sprint]
4. [System with regression risk from this sprint's changes]
5. [Data persistence round-trip — create → read → update → delete]
6. No new errors in logs during smoke run

---

## Non-Functional Verification

| Concern | Target | Method | Result |
|---------|--------|--------|--------|
| Performance | p95 < [X]ms for [endpoint] | Load test via k6 | |
| Security | No new HIGH/CRITICAL CVEs | `deps-audit` + SAST scan | |
| Accessibility | WCAG 2.1 AA on [new UI] | axe-core + manual | |
| Observability | Logs + metrics emitted for new flows | Inspect dashboards | |

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists for all Unit / Integration / E2E stories and passes in CI
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for all UI and Manual stories
- [ ] Smoke check passes before deploy
- [ ] No regressions introduced — previous sprint's features still pass
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or peer PR review)
- [ ] Story / ticket updated to `Status: Complete`

**Stories requiring security / performance sign-off before close**: [list, or "None"]
